mappings.reason: Establishing and maintaining a documented incident response process directly satisfies the core requirement of IR-01 to define and govern the Incident Response Plan, including roles, communication, and review.
Establishing a documented process for workforce incident reporting satisfies the specific IR-01 requirement for procedures and contact methods to report incidents.
Maintaining contact information for parties to be informed satisfies the specific IR-01 requirement to include support team contact information in the plan.
Defining primary and secondary communication mechanisms satisfies the specific IR-01 requirement for an incident coordination and communication strategy.
Establishing security incident thresholds and types satisfies the specific IR-01 requirement to define the types of incidents that need to be managed.
Assigning key roles and responsibilities for incident response satisfies the specific IR-01 requirement to define support team roles within the plan.
Designating personnel to manage incident handling satisfies the specific IR-01 requirement to identify support team management within the plan.
